overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person view from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus travels along wet urban streets with active windshield wipers, stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers, and continues through moderate traffic. The scene features detailed vehicle interiors, realistic rain effects, and Eastern European-style apartment buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with parked cars and traffic signals

events.description: bus overtakes a blue truck on the left side
approaching intersection with traffic lights, stopping at red then proceeding on green
slowing down and signaling to pull into bus stop on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating the bus through wet streets at moderate speed, maintaining safe distance from vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: red car ahead being followed at safe distance
blue truck being overtaken on the left

entered.detail: multi-story concrete residential buildings lining the right side of the street
mature deciduous trees with green foliage along the left sidewalk
white lane dividers and directional arrows on the wet asphalt
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet multi-lane urban road during heavy rain, with windshield wipers active. Concrete apartment buildings line the right side while trees border the left. The bus overtakes a blue truck and approaches a traffic light intersection, slowing down as it nears the designated bus stop area.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with bench and advertisement display

events.description: pulling into bus stop and coming to a complete stop at the curb
front doors opening with green indicator light above door
passengers beginning to board from the right side sidewalk

agents.ego_description: stopped at designated bus stop with doors open, monitoring passengers as they board and pay fare

notable_agents.action: passenger in red jacket entering through front door and showing ticket
passenger in light blue shirt boarding after the first passenger

entered.detail: covered bus stop structure with glass panels and metal frame
teal-colored sedan parked or stopped alongside the bus on the left
metal bench under the shelter for waiting passengers
yellow and white advertisement displayed on the shelter panel

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a bus stop shelter on the right side of the road. The front doors are open and passengers are boarding from the sidewalk. A turquoise car is visible on the left side. The bus remains stopped for an extended period to allow passenger boarding, with the interior cabin lights visible and the destination display showing route information.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street departing bus stop zone

events.description: closing doors and accelerating away from the bus stop
merging back into the traffic lane and resuming speed

agents.ego_description: closing bus doors and pulling away from the curb, accelerating to rejoin the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan passing the bus as it departs the stop

entered.detail: open road stretching ahead with wet reflective surface
headlights from vehicles approaching in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The bus closes its doors and accelerates away from the bus stop, merging back into traffic. The windshield wipers continue clearing heavy rain as the vehicle gains speed. The bus stop shelter recedes behind as the bus rejoins the multi-lane road, with oncoming traffic headlights visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban corridor, pausing for passengers before merging back into traffic. It begins with the bus driving along a wet multi-lane road under heavy rain, passing concrete apartment buildings and overtaking a blue truck as it slows toward a stop. The motion then comes to a halt at a roadside shelter, where the doors open to allow passengers to board while a turquoise car lingers nearby. As the boarding process completes, the doors close and the bus accelerates away from the shelter, causing the stop to recede into the distance. The scene finally shifts back to a steady cruise through the storm, with the windshield wipers clearing the glass as the vehicle rejoins the flow of traffic amidst the glow of oncoming headlights.
